/Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/usr/bin/c++ -g -arch arm64 -isysroot /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX14.4.sdk -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/FluidSimulation.dir/src/app/controls.cpp.o CMakeFiles/FluidSimulation.dir/src/app/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/FluidSimulation.dir/src/render/WaterRenderer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/FluidSimulation.dir/src/sim/WaterSimulation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/FluidSimulation.dir/src/util/asset/objLoader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/FluidSimulation.dir/src/util/gl/demoShader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/FluidSimulation.dir/src/util/gl/openglDebug.cpp.o CMakeFiles/FluidSimulation.dir/src/platform/MetalSimulationBackend.mm.o -o FluidSimulation  -framework OpenGL external-dependencies/glfw-3.4/src/libglfw3.a external-dependencies/glad/libglad.a external-dependencies/stb_image/libstb_image.a external-dependencies/stb_truetype/libstb_truetype.a external-dependencies/imgui-docking/libimgui.a -framework Metal -framework Foundation external-dependencies/glfw-3.4/src/libglfw3.a -framework Cocoa -framework IOKit -framework CoreFoundation external-dependencies/glad/libglad.a
